footer.tagline: Team coordination, simplified for sports clubs.
footer.tagline2: Built for clubs, coaches, parents and players.

home.badge: The platform for amateur sports clubs
home.title: Your club's energy, finally coordinated.
home.subtitle: One-click convocations, real-time attendance, clear communication. Clubero works alongside your WhatsApp — it doesn't replace it — to structure what matters without changing your habits.
home.featuresBody: Keep your WhatsApp group for chatting. Let Clubero handle convocations, attendance and reminders — in hybrid mode.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your club's coordination?
home.ctaBody: Join clubs that replace chaos with clarity.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade with ease.
pricing.subtitle: 30-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.trialBody: Full access to all platform features for 30 days. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
pricing.enterpriseBody: Custom pricing based on your needs.
pricing.footer: All plans include European hosting, GDPR compliance and email support.
